name: Oil Rig
notes: Buildable at all bases with an identical build/upgrade cost everywhere (see game-design/03-resources.md's Oil Rig Notes) — the Capital's -50% production penalty and +50% base-wide bonus are structured resourceModifiers entries on the Capital's BaseDef (data/bases/schema.json), not a variant of this definition. No inherent level cap, only the HQ-level ceiling. Winter Forge's Ice Spire applies a separate friendly_buildings-targeted aura boosting Oil Rig output at that base. Ticks automatically every 5s resource tick, no player input (Resource category). HP regen follows the global rule (5% of current max HP per 5s tick), not a per-building field.
